result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  TyGoTech.Tool.LightweightScriptManager [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  build  Build a runtime config for the latest resources.
  init   Initialize runtime config for repository.
  fetch  Fetch the latest resources using the runtime config settings.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize runtime config for repository.

Usage:
  TyGoTech.Tool.LightweightScriptManager init [options]

Options:
  -f, --force                      Overwrites the current runtime config file if one exists.
  -p, --package-uri <package-uri>  The base URI that hosts the config files. [default: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TyGoTech/tool-lightweight.script.manager/main/resources/dotnet/]
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
